seat_diameter.description: Diameter of the circular seat top

overall_height.description: Total height from floor to top of seat

leg_length.description: Length of each leg from seat underside to floor

leg_diameter.description: Diameter of each cylindrical turned leg

leg_splay_angle.description: Outward splay angle of each leg from vertical

leg_spread_radius.description: Radius of the circle on which leg centres are mounted on seat underside

foot_spread_diameter.description: Diameter of the circle formed by the four leg tips at floor level

seat_edge_radius.description: Rounding radius on the top edge of the seat

leg_count.description: Number of legs, evenly spaced at 90-degree intervals

stretcher_height.description: Height of the cross-brace stretcher ring from the floor

stretcher_ring_diameter.description: Diameter of the stretcher ring connecting the four legs
